title: Neopolitan
description: 1.21.6 | Neopolitan is a Vanilla+ Modpack that adds a bunch of QoL features
body:
**Neopolitan** is a Vanilla+ Modpack that adds a bunch of QoL features that are essential in any 1.21+ Minecraft Experience! (particularly on servers/multiplayer), some of those features being:

- 📷 Better Camera Movement
- 🔊 Realistic Sound Effects
- ✨ Tons of new particles
- ⬆️ And so much more!

It is still currently in development, so if you want to add a mod or a new feature, **you can join our discord server!**
